TC_AUTH_001 Authentication Authentication Verification Scenario #1 - Detailed checks and boundary conditions High Passed 184ms
Preconditions: App is installed. Device is in local simulated database mode.
Test Steps:
  1. Launch the Focus Buddy application
  2. Navigate to the active viewport matching the Authentication component
  3. Perform simulated input validation check number 1
  4. Verify UI state transitions match expectations
Expected Result: The Authentication interface should load without errors, update UI elements correctly, and maintain state persistence.
Actual Result: UI transition completed successfully. All assertions passed.
